Settler Frontier

📁 Javascript Game Start Date: April 18, 2026 Status: Ongoing
Tags:

🚐 Caravan Survival

Choose your mode:

🌄 The Bunker Opens

In 2030, a great disaster occurred. Nobody knows what it is. When it became obvious that the era of man was over, 1000 people were sealed in a bunker.

You are the trusted leader of the caravan. A brave new Frontier awaits among the ruins of the old. Your goal is to find a suitable place for the caravan to settle down.
